channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: Iran fires missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain, U.S. strikes Iran facility
item.description: The U.S. military said that Iran fired missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain that failed or were shot down, and that the U.S. launched strikes on an Iranian facility in response.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. military said that Iran fired missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain that failed or were shot down, and that the U.S. launched strikes on an Iranian facility in response.


(Image credit: Amirhosein Khorgooi)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Peabo Bryson, known for 'Aladdin' and 'Beauty and the Beast' duets, has died at 75
item.description: Grammy Award-winning R&B singer Peabo Bryson has died at 75. He was known for his Disney duets "Beauty and the Beast" and "A Whole New World." He died Tuesday after having a stroke.
item.content:encoded:
Grammy Award-winning R&B singer Peabo Bryson has died at 75. He was known for his Disney duets "Beauty and the Beast" and "A Whole New World." He died Tuesday after having a stroke.

(Image credit: Reed Saxon)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Why one of the cities most dependent on the Colorado River now has water for sale
item.description: Once one of the most dependent on the Colorado River, San Diego now may have water to sell to states that are seeing their supplies from the shrinking river cut.
item.content:encoded:
Once one of the most dependent on the Colorado River, San Diego now may have water to sell to states that are seeing their supplies from the shrinking river cut.

(Image credit: Annika Hammerschlag)
item.dc:creator: Kirk Siegler

item.title: Supreme Court reinstates Republican-favored Alabama congressional districts
item.description: The ruling means that Alabama's 2026 midterm elections will feature six Republican-leaning districts and one Democratic-leaning one.
item.content:encoded:
The ruling means that Alabama's 2026 midterm elections will feature six Republican-leaning districts and one Democratic-leaning one.

(Image credit: Tasos Katopodis)
item.dc:creator: Grady Martin

item.title: 'Hellions' author Julia Elliott wins $150K fiction prize
item.description: The author is known for genre-bending stories that span Southern gothic, horror and fairy tale.
item.content:encoded:
The author is known for genre-bending stories that span Southern gothic, horror and fairy tale.

(Image credit: Forrest Clonts/Tin House)
item.dc:creator: Chloee Weiner

item.title: DOJ is investigating former congressman George Santos for insider trading on Kalshi
item.description: The disgraced former congressman allegedly bet on whether he would appear at the State of the Union address, prompting federal investigations.
item.content:encoded:
The disgraced former congressman allegedly bet on whether he would appear at the State of the Union address, prompting federal investigations.

(Image credit: Michael M. Santiago)
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn

item.title: Scenes from the aftermath of Russia's latest massive attack on Kyiv
item.description: Russian missile and drone attacks killed civilians across Ukraine overnight, in one of Moscow's largest assaults in recent months.
item.content:encoded:
Russian missile and drone attacks killed civilians across Ukraine overnight, in one of Moscow's largest assaults in recent months.

(Image credit: Anton Shtuka for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Polina Lytvynova

item.title: Trump signs AI safety order seeking voluntary review of new models
item.description: The order asks AI companies to voluntarily submit their most powerful models for the government to test up to 30 days before releasing them to the public.
item.content:encoded:
'/>

The order asks AI companies to voluntarily submit their most powerful models for the government to test up to 30 days before releasing them to the public.

(Image credit: Graeme Sloan)
item.dc:creator: Shannon Bond

item.title: Mary Beard illuminates the ancient world -- and our own -- in 'Talking Classics'
item.description: As a classics professor, Beard has spent her career pondering life in the ancient world. The central question of her latest book is: What on earth was it like to be there?
item.content:encoded: As a classics professor, Beard has spent her career pondering life in the ancient world. The central question of her latest book is: What on earth was it like to be there?
item.dc:creator: Maureen Corrigan

item.title: 5 ways to reduce everyday exposure to 'forever chemicals'
item.description: Mara Hoplamazian has spent years reporting on 'forever chemicals,' or PFAS. Here's what they've learned about what may help limit everyday exposure to the contaminant.
item.content:encoded:
Mara Hoplamazian has spent years reporting on 'forever chemicals,' or PFAS. Here's what they've learned about what may help limit everyday exposure to the contaminant.

(Image credit: show999/Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Mara Hoplamazian
